title: 有馬記念の後に・終わりではなく！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I won the Arima Kinen! I won the ultimate race of
dreams! And that was...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I want to run in an even more heated races! And
not just that...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I want to keep showing everyone our dreams!
After all, we're the ultimate generation!
